SEARCH
Package de.dlr.proseo.model.rest.model

Class RestTrigger

java.lang.Object
de.dlr.proseo.model.rest.model.RestTrigger
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class RestTrigger extends Object implements Serializable
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected String
    cronExpression
    A cron-style expression to schedule trigger firing
    protected String
    datatakeType
    Type of datatake as annotated in Mission Planning files
    protected Long
    deltaTime
    Time offset for the trigger to fire, relative to the mission planning object's start time
    protected Boolean
    enabled
    Flag determining whether the trigger is usable
    protected Long
    executionDelay
    Delay time range to run an order
    protected Long
    id
    The persistent id of this object
    protected String
    inputFileClass
    The file class of the input product (optional)
    protected String
    inputProcessingMode
    The processing mode of the input product (optional)
    protected String
    inputProductType
    Product type of the input product class (mandatory for DataDrivenOrderTrigger)
    protected String
    lastDatatakeStartTime
    Start time of the last datatake, for which a processing order was generated
    protected Long
    lastOrbitNumber
    The number of the last orbit for which a trigger was generated
    protected String
    missionCode
    The mission code (e. g.
    protected String
    name
    Short name of the trigger
    protected String
    nextTriggerTime
    Next time to run
    protected String
    orderTemplateName
    Short name of the order template
    protected List<String>
    parametersToCopy
    Set of keys for datatake parameters/attributes to copy as output parameters to the processing order
    protected Long
    priority
    Priority of the ProcessingOrder (lower number means lower priority; value range 1..100 is defined for the ODIP, but other values are allowed outside On-Demand Production, including negative numbers).
    (package private) static final long
    serialVersionUID
     
    protected String
    spacecraftCode
    The spacecraft code whose orbit start times determine the trigger times
    protected Long
    triggerInterval
    Interval time range to run next job
    protected String
    type
    The trigger type (one of "DataDriven", "TimeInterval", "Calendar", "Orbit", "Datatake")
    protected Long
    version
    A version identifier to track updates to the object (especially to detect concurrent update attempts)

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • id

      protected Long id
      The persistent id of this object

    • version

      protected Long version
      A version identifier to track updates to the object (especially to detect concurrent update attempts)

    • missionCode

      protected String missionCode
      The mission code (e. g. S5P)

    • name

      protected String name
      Short name of the trigger

    • type

      protected String type
      The trigger type (one of "DataDriven", "TimeInterval", "Calendar", "Orbit", "Datatake")

    • orderTemplateName

      protected String orderTemplateName
      Short name of the order template

    • inputProductType

      protected String inputProductType
      Product type of the input product class (mandatory for DataDrivenOrderTrigger)

    • inputFileClass

      protected String inputFileClass
      The file class of the input product (optional)

    • inputProcessingMode

      protected String inputProcessingMode
      The processing mode of the input product (optional)

    • executionDelay

      protected Long executionDelay
      Delay time range to run an order

    • priority

      protected Long priority
      Priority of the ProcessingOrder (lower number means lower priority; value range 1..100 is defined for the ODIP, but other values are allowed outside On-Demand Production, including negative numbers). Default value is 50.

    • nextTriggerTime

      protected String nextTriggerTime
      Next time to run

    • triggerInterval

      protected Long triggerInterval
      Interval time range to run next job

    • cronExpression

      protected String cronExpression
      A cron-style expression to schedule trigger firing

    • spacecraftCode

      protected String spacecraftCode
      The spacecraft code whose orbit start times determine the trigger times

    • lastOrbitNumber

      protected Long lastOrbitNumber
      The number of the last orbit for which a trigger was generated

    • datatakeType

      protected String datatakeType
      Type of datatake as annotated in Mission Planning files

    • lastDatatakeStartTime

      protected String lastDatatakeStartTime
      Start time of the last datatake, for which a processing order was generated

    • deltaTime

      protected Long deltaTime
      Time offset for the trigger to fire, relative to the mission planning object's start time

    • parametersToCopy

      protected List<String> parametersToCopy
      Set of keys for datatake parameters/attributes to copy as output parameters to the processing order

    • enabled

      protected Boolean enabled
      Flag determining whether the trigger is usable
